mapper.select: SELECT ri.id, ri.release_id, ri.issue_id, ri.task_id, ri.category, ri.notes, ri.added_by, ri.added_at, rp.name AS release_name, su.username AS added_by_name FROM release_issue ri LEFT JOIN release_plan rp ON ri.release_id = rp.id AND rp.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ri.added_by = su.id AND su.deleted = 0 ${ew.customSqlSegment} ORDER BY ri.added_at DESC
